name: Chicken and Sweet Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 each 10 oz. Cream of chicken soup, Light OR
1 each White sauce, chicken flavor (use bouillon cube)
recipeInstructions:
Drained and sliced.
Preheat oven to 350°F. In a medium-sized bowl, combine sweet potatoes, brown sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, and milk. Spread around the inside edge of a round 10-inch casserole dish, forming a ring. In a medium-sized non-stick skillet, heat broth over low heat. Add onion and water chestnuts; cook until tender. Add soup or sauce, chicken, and 3 tablespoons water; cook over medium heat until hot, stirring occasionally. Spoon the chicken mixture into the center of the sweet potato ring in the casserole dish. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes or until bubbling.
